you_can_use_this_page_to_deactivate_your.value: You can use this page to deactivate your account if it is currently active, or to reactivate your account if you previously deactivated it. Deactivation will freeze all of the funds currently in your account, log out anybody currently logged in, and prevent new log ins to your account. In order to reactivate your account, you will need to verify an OTP, reset your password, and, if applicable, reset your Sporty PIN.

you_cannot_vaction_this_account_please_c.value: You cannot {action} this account. Please contact {customerService}.

deactivate_reactivate_desc_tip.value:
If deactivation is successful your account will be:
• Logged out from all devices
• Login restricted
• Balance restricted
If reactivation is successful your account will be:
• Logged in on this device
• Login unrestricted
• Balance unrestricted
• Password reset
• Sporty PIN reset (if applicable)

after_completing_the_otp_verifaction_you.value: After completing the OTP Verification, you need to reset your credentials within 15 minutes, You have failed to reset your credentials in time. Please try again.

for_the_security_of_your_account_you_mus.value: For the security of your account, you must reset your password and Sporty PIN within 15 minutes.

your_password_must_be_6_14_characters_lo.value: Your password must be at least 8 characters long and must contain at least one upper case letter, one lower case letter and one number.

logged_out_from_all_devices_login_restri.value: Logged out from all devices, Login restricted, Balance restricted

logged_in_sign_in_unrestricted_balance_u.value: Logged in, Sign in unrestricted, Balance unrestricted

please_contact_vcustomerservice_if_you_r.value: Please contact {customerService} if you require further assistance.

account_deactivation_cannot_be_done_for_.value: Account deactivation cannot be done for unhealthy betting behaviour, as you can later reactivate your account. Instead, please use the self-exclusion feature, which cannot be undone until the timespan you specify has elapsed.

sorry_we_cannot_deactivate_this_account_.value: Sorry, we cannot deactivate this account. Please contact {customerService}

you_cannot_reactivate_this_account_pleas.value: You cannot reactivate this account. Please contact  {customerService}

to_deactivate_or_reactivate_your_account.value: To deactivate or reactivate your account {action}.

you_can_use_this_page_to_deactivate_your.value: You can use this page to deactivate your account. Deactivation will freeze all of the funds currently in your account, log out anybody currently logged in (including this device), and prevent new logins to your account. In order to reactivate your account, you will need to verify an OTP, reset your password, and, if applicable, reset your Sporty PIN.

if_you_leave_now_your_account_will_not_b.value: If you leave now, your account will not be activated

account_activation.value: To deactivate or reactivate your account

deactivate_successful_tip.value:
• Logged out from all devices
• Login restricted
• Balance restricted

reactivate_successful_tip.value:
• Logged in
• Sign in unrestricted
• Balance unrestricted
